title: High Availability & Disaster Recovery
subtitle: CUCM redundancy, failover and business continuity architecture

items.title: Publisher
items.desc: Primary node handling configuration and database writes in CUCM cluster.

items.title: Subscribers
items.desc: Handle call processing and provide redundancy and load balancing.

items.title: SRST
items.desc: Enables branch survivability during WAN or CUCM connectivity failure.

items.title: DRS Backup
items.desc: Disaster Recovery System used for CUCM backup and restore operations.

items.title: Geographic Redundancy
items.desc: Cluster deployment across multiple sites for maximum availability.
